extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE attacked with YATES and HIRSCHI in final 3km, sat on until Yates led out under pressure from charging peloton at 1km, then jumped to win stage and yellow.
tactical_patterns: Alaphilippe exploited Adam Yates's yellow jersey math dilemma to force him to lead out while peloton closed at 16 seconds.
Trentine beat Sagan in intermediate sprint drag race on hilly terrain, signaling GC sprinters vulnerable against climbing sprinters.
Three-man break shadow-boxed excessively close to finish allowing peloton to nearly catch them within final kilometer.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: first win of season, showed calm patience forcing Yates to work then had decisive acceleration with peloton 200m behind
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: trapped into leading out break despite being strongest, tactical positioning error surrendered 8-second bonus advantage
rider_signals.TRENTINE Matteo: positive: outsprinted Sagan straight-up for 20 intermediate points, climbing sprinter threat to traditional fastmen on rolling stages
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: neutral: lacked final kick against Alaphilippe despite making selection, nearly caught by peloton after extended cat-mouse game
